CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-22-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Hinds.
Sally Morin, Esq. for Plaintiff royalty Auto Collision Center, represent by Cesar Dominguez, authorized agent, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Oscar Gayorgor as follows:
Principal of $758.44
Attorney's fees of $660.00
Costs of $661.26
Interest of $1,577.25.
For the total of $3.656.95
Judgment signed in open court.
